title: Farewells
description: Learn farewells in Filipino Sign Language

pages.title: Welcome to Farewells
pages.content: In this lesson, you'll learn how to sign farewells in Filipino Sign Language (FSL). You'll learn 1 important signs with step-by-step instructions and practice questions.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Bye'
pages.content: Learn how to sign 'Bye'. An informal way of saying goodbye, used when parting from someone.

pages.title: Practice: Bye
pages.content: Test your understanding with this question.

question.explanation: This sign means 'Bye'. An informal way of saying goodbye, used when parting from someone.
